results.name: mathd_numbertheory_764
results.statement:
definition inv_mod::"nat \<Rightarrow> nat \<Rightarrow> nat" where
  "inv_mod d p = (SOME x. [x*d = 1] (mod p))"
theorem mathd_numbertheory_764:
  fixes p :: nat
  assumes "prime p"
  and "7 \<le> p" 
shows "[(\<Sum> k \<in> {1..<p-1}. inv_mod k p * inv_mod (k+1) p) = 2] (mod p)"
results.proof:
theorem mathd_numbertheory_764:
  fixes p :: nat
  assumes "prime p"
  and "7 \<le> p" 
shows "[(\<Sum> k \<in> {1..<p-1}. inv_mod k p * inv_mod (k+1) p) = 2] (mod p)"
proof -
  let ?g = "\<lambda>k. int (inv_mod k p)"
  let ?S = "(\<Sum> k \<in> {1..<p-1}. inv_mod k p * inv_mod (k+1) p)"
  have intS: "int ?S = (\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. int (inv_mod k p * inv_mod (k+1) p))"
    by simp
  have c1: "[int ?S = (\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. ?g k - ?g (k+1))] (mod int p)"
    using intS sum_telescope_cong[OF assms] by simp
  have tel: "(\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. ?g k - ?g (k+1)) = ?g 1 - ?g (p-1)"
    using sum_telescope_int[of 1 "p-1" ?g] assms by simp
  have c2: "[int ?S = ?g 1 - ?g (p-1)] (mod int p)" using c1 tel by simp
  have g1: "[?g 1 = 1] (mod int p)"
    using cong_nat_to_int[OF inv_mod_1[OF assms]] by simp
  have gpm1: "[?g (p-1) = -1] (mod int p)" using inv_mod_pm1[OF assms] .
  have "[?g 1 - ?g (p-1) = 1 - (-1)] (mod int p)"
    using g1 gpm1 by (intro cong_diff) auto
  then have "[?g 1 - ?g (p-1) = 2] (mod int p)" by simp
  with c2 have "[int ?S = 2] (mod int p)" using cong_trans by blast
  then have "[int ?S = int 2] (mod int p)" by simp
  then show ?thesis using cong_int_iff by blast
qed
